def positive_large_object_cloned_before_read_only_operation():
    rule_id = "large_object_cloned_before_read_only_operation"
    family = "performance"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flag code that deep-copies large structures even when the next steps are read-only."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
